# Data Stack Guide

> Data Stack Guide is an independent review site covering 80+ B2B sales, marketing, and data tools with transparent pricing, head-to-head comparisons, and "best for" category rankings. Every pricing page documents actual list prices (not "contact us"), every comparison includes real user complaints and G2 data, and every "best of" list explains the scoring methodology. Built for RevOps leaders, sales engineers, and tool buyers who need honest information before they hop on a sales call.

The site covers the full B2B tech stack: contact databases (ZoomInfo, Apollo, Cognism, Clearbit), sales engagement (Outreach, Salesloft, Gong), data enrichment (Clearbit, FullEnrich, Clay), ABM platforms (6sense, Demandbase), ETL/reverse ETL (Fivetran, Airbyte, Hightouch, Census), and emerging AI SDR tools (11x, Artisan, AiSDR). Pricing is sourced from vendor sites, public pricing pages, and verified user reports. Comparisons quote named G2 reviewers with links.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://datastackguide.com/): Independent B2B tool reviews, pricing, and comparisons
- [All Tools](https://datastackguide.com/tools/): Browse reviewed tools by category
- [All Pricing Pages](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/): Transparent pricing for 70+ B2B tools
- [All Comparisons](https://datastackguide.com/compare/): Head-to-head tool comparisons
- [All "Best Of" Lists](https://datastackguide.com/best/): Category rankings with scoring methodology
- [Methodology](https://datastackguide.com/methodology/): How we research, score, and rank tools

## Pricing Pages

- [ZoomInfo Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/zoominfo-pricing/): ZoomInfo list pricing tiers and hidden fees
- [Apollo Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/apollo-pricing/): Apollo.io pricing breakdown with credit costs
- [Cognism Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/cognism-pricing/): Cognism pricing and contract terms
- [Clearbit Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/clearbit-pricing/): Clearbit pricing after HubSpot acquisition
- [Clay Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/clay-pricing/): Clay credit costs and workflow pricing
- [Outreach Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/outreach-pricing/): Outreach sales engagement pricing
- [Salesloft Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/salesloft-pricing/): Salesloft tier pricing
- [Gong Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/gong-pricing/): Gong conversation intelligence cost
- [6sense Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/6sense-pricing/): 6sense ABM platform pricing
- [Demandbase Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/demandbase-pricing/): Demandbase ABM pricing tiers
- [Fivetran Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/fivetran-pricing/): Fivetran MAR-based pricing model
- [Airbyte Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/airbyte-pricing/): Airbyte open source vs cloud pricing
- [Hightouch Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/hightouch-pricing/): Hightouch reverse ETL pricing
- [HubSpot Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/hubspot-pricing/): HubSpot Hub pricing and add-ons
- [Definitive Healthcare Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/definitive-healthcare-pricing/): Definitive Healthcare enterprise pricing
- [Clari Pricing](https://datastackguide.com/pricing/clari-pricing/): Clari revenue platform pricing

## Head-to-Head Comparisons

- [Apollo vs ZoomInfo](https://datastackguide.com/compare/apollo-vs-zoominfo/): Apollo vs ZoomInfo feature and pricing comparison
- [Clay vs ZoomInfo](https://datastackguide.com/compare/clay-vs-zoominfo/): Clay workflows vs ZoomInfo database
- [Clay vs Apollo](https://datastackguide.com/compare/clay-vs-apollo/): Clay vs Apollo for data enrichment
- [Clay vs Clearbit](https://datastackguide.com/compare/clay-vs-clearbit/): Clay vs Clearbit for enrichment workflows
- [Clearbit vs ZoomInfo](https://datastackguide.com/compare/clearbit-vs-zoominfo/): Clearbit vs ZoomInfo for enterprise
- [Cognism vs ZoomInfo](https://datastackguide.com/compare/cognism-vs-zoominfo/): Cognism vs ZoomInfo with GDPR compliance
- [Cognism vs Apollo](https://datastackguide.com/compare/cognism-vs-apollo/): Cognism vs Apollo comparison
- [6sense vs Demandbase](https://datastackguide.com/compare/6sense-vs-demandbase/): 6sense vs Demandbase ABM platform comparison
- [Outreach vs Salesloft](https://datastackguide.com/compare/outreach-vs-salesloft/): Sales engagement platform face-off
- [Clari vs Gong](https://datastackguide.com/compare/clari-vs-gong/): Revenue intelligence vs conversation intelligence
- [Fivetran vs Airbyte](https://datastackguide.com/compare/airbyte-vs-fivetran/): Managed ETL vs open source ETL
- [Census vs Hightouch](https://datastackguide.com/compare/census-vs-hightouch/): Reverse ETL head to head
- [Apollo vs Outreach](https://datastackguide.com/compare/apollo-vs-outreach-io/): Apollo engage vs Outreach
- [Apollo vs Salesloft](https://datastackguide.com/compare/apollo-vs-salesloft/): Apollo vs Salesloft for outbound

- [Best ABM Platforms](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-abm-platforms/): Account-based marketing platforms
- [Best AI Sales Tools](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-ai-sales-tools/): AI-powered sales tool rankings
- [Best Conversation Intelligence Tools](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-conversation-intelligence-tools/): Gong, Chorus, and alternatives
- [Best Cold Email Tools](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-cold-email-tools/): Cold email platform rankings
- [Best CPQ Tools](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-cpq-tools/): Configure-price-quote tools
- [Best CRM for Startups](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-crm-for-startups/): CRM recommendations by stage
- [Best CRM for Enterprise](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-crm-for-enterprise/): Enterprise CRM comparison
- [Best CRM for Healthcare](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-crm-for-healthcare/): Healthcare-specific CRM options
- [Best Data Catalog Tools](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-data-catalog-tools/): Data catalog platforms
- [Best Data Deduplication Tools](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-data-deduplication-tools/): Deduplication tool rankings
- [Best Analytics for Sales Teams](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-analytics-for-sales-teams/): Sales analytics tools
- [Best Customer Engagement Platforms](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-customer-engagement-platforms/): Customer engagement platform rankings
- [Best Healthcare Sales Intelligence](https://datastackguide.com/best/best-healthcare-sales-intelligence/): Definitive Healthcare alternatives
